---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem / use case**
What workflow are you trying to improve? Who is it for?

**Proposed solution**
What should happen. Keep it focused — this app is intentionally one tight workflow.

**Where it fits**
- [ ] Extraction quality (parser / LLM prompt)
- [ ] Board UX (cards, drag, filter, sort, export)
- [ ] i18n / accessibility
- [ ] Anna integration (tools / storage / chat / agent)
- [ ] Other: …

**Alternatives considered**
Anything you ruled out, and why.
